# Mi Granja

> Spanish-language farm management app (multi-tenant). Next.js 16 App Router + Firebase + Redux Toolkit + Tailwind CSS 4. pnpm + Turborepo monorepo.

Mi Granja tracks animals, breeding, reminders, sales, and farm collaborators. Apps: `dashboard` (Next.js 16) and `landing` (Astro 5). Shared types/utils in `@mi-granja/shared`. Business model is admin-managed "Lugares" (no payment integrations).

## Documentation

- [Docs index](docs/README.md): Entry point for all documentation
- [Architecture](docs/architecture.md): Monorepo layout, stack, data flow
- [Conventions](docs/conventions.md): Linter, imports, client directives, backup sync
- [Commands](docs/commands.md): pnpm/turbo commands
- [Glossary](docs/GLOSSARY.md): Spanish ganadero vocabulary
- [Roadmap](docs/roadmap.md): Pending, done, dropped

## Features

- [Auth](docs/features/auth.md): Email/password + magic link + admin impersonation
- [Permissions](docs/features/permissions.md): Role × module matrix, hasPermissions helper
- [Farms](docs/features/farms.md): Multi-tenant farms + invitation lifecycle
- [Animals](docs/features/animals.md): Animal CRUD, stages, AnimalSelector
- [Billing](docs/features/billing.md): Lugares model, Pro gates, ModalUpgradePlan
- [Modals](docs/features/modals.md): Modal system + useModal hook
- [Emails](docs/features/emails.md): Brevo integration
- [Backups](docs/features/backups.md): Export/import + sync rule
- [Dates](docs/features/dates.md): DateTimeInput, timezone safety

## Decisions (ADRs)

- [001 Monorepo](docs/decisions/001-monorepo.md): pnpm + Turborepo
- [002 No Stripe / Lugares](docs/decisions/002-no-stripe-lugares.md): Admin-managed plans
- [003 Biome](docs/decisions/003-biome-over-eslint.md): Biome replaces ESLint + Prettier
- [004 Redux Toolkit](docs/decisions/004-redux-over-context.md): Redux over Context
- [005 Shared package](docs/decisions/005-shared-package.md): @mi-granja/shared

## Agents

- [ux-ganadero](docs/agents/ux-ganadero.md): UX reviewer for ganadero users

- [README](README.md): Legacy README (historical overview)
